news.t: GraniteShares Announces Reverse Split of MRAL, MSTP, and SMCL
GraniteShares launches new ETF on SMCI (Super Micro Computer) GraniteShares 2x Long SMCI Daily ETF (SMCL)

holdings.infoBox: SMCL is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Recv Long 2x Smci Trs Cs1 stock at 102.16%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 76.87%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 57.38%, Recv Long 2x Smci Trs Mx1 at 54.99%, and Recv Long Scmi Us Trs Nm1 at 42.30%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long SMCI Daily ETF (SMCL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Super Micro Computer Inc (ticker: SMCI) stock. SMCL was launched on Dec 12, 2024 and is issued by GraniteShares.
